title: Multilingual Text Classification with Transformers
desc: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning for multilingual text classification using adapter-based methods targeting Q1 journal publication.

title: Video Fake Frame Detection using VIA-Net
desc: Novel deep learning architecture for detecting manipulated frames in video content, submitted for Q1 publication.

title: SDG Classification using SciBERT-GraphSAGE
desc: Hybrid NLP and graph learning framework mapping research publications to UN Sustainable Development Goals.

title: AI Platform for Disease Spread During Arbaeen
desc: Graph neural network models predicting infectious disease spread in large crowd gatherings using real epidemiological data.

title: Predictive Analytics for Student Performance
desc: Using academic data and ML models to predict and improve student outcomes at the College of AI.

title: Arabic Sentiment Analysis using BERT
desc: Fine-tuned Arabic BERT model for sentiment classification across social media datasets.
